# Anchor Partners
# https://www.anchorpartners.group

## About
Anchor Partners is a managed services firm for lower middle market asset managers. We take on the operational workflows that investment teams should not be spending their time on — the unglamorous, recurring, mission-critical work that quietly consumes hours every week.

## What We Do
- Take operational workflows off your plate entirely
- Own, run, and deliver outcomes without the overhead
- Fast onboarding with no bloated implementations
- Subscription-based pricing with clear ROI

## Who We Serve
- Credit-focused asset managers (private credit, direct lending, CLOs, distressed debt, leveraged loans)
- Firms with 5-30 employees
- AUM of $50M and above
- COOs, CFOs, Directors of Operations

## Key Differentiators
- We are not a consulting firm — we charge for doing the work, not advice
- Predictable subscription pricing
- Immediate ROI — your time is worth more than what we charge
- No vendor lock-in

## Contact
- Website: https://www.anchorpartners.group
- Book a call: https://cal.com/anchorpartners/30min

## Pricing
Plans start at $20K/year with a refund guarantee if we don't deliver measurable value.
